category_sources: Official GitHub README describes HTTrack as an offline browser utility for downloading websites to a local directory.
source_facts.description says HTTrack is a website copier/offline browser.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use the product name HTTrack.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official HTTrack site; it provides official documentation pages including the index and httrack man page.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository description states it is the official repository for HTTrack Website Copier.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official README says HTTrack downloads websites recursively and can update or resume mirrored sites.
